plugins.name: session
plugins.description: Developer productivity tools for analyzing coding sessions, tracking accomplishments, and knowing when to take a break

plugins.name: feature-map
plugins.description: Point at any codebase and generate a GTM-focused feature map. Translates technical capabilities into buyer outcomes, business lift, and competitive positioning using a team of parallel agents.

plugins.name: gtm
plugins.description: Go-to-market engine. Scan any codebase, determine ICP, research competitors, build positioning, generate landing pages, and create outbound sequences.

plugins.name: sumble-api
plugins.description: Sales intelligence API skill for searching companies by tech stack, enriching organizations, finding people by role/seniority, and discovering job postings.

plugins.name: linear-swarm
plugins.description: Ship a whole Linear project in one session by fanning out parallel worktree or Daytona-sandbox agents, auditing with Codex + specialist reviewers, running structural smoke, sequentially merging PRs, deploying, and verifying against live production. Gracefully enhanced by Every's compound-engineering-plugin when both are installed.
